In this story, a man dies in a car accident and meets God in the afterlife. God explains that he will be reincarnated, but reveals that all humans are incarnations of the same soul, including historical figures like Abraham Lincoln and even Adolf Hitler. The story unfolds as a philosophical dialogue, emphasizing that each experience contributes to the soul's growth and maturity. Ultimately, God reveals that the entire universe serves as an 'egg' for the man to evolve into a being like God, suggesting a cyclical process of growth through experiencing every human life.
